modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to complete KnowBe4 Security Training due to error message.

full_description_text: User is attempting to finish the KnowBe4 Security Training module. An error message appears stating, "Click on your email platform." This prevents progress in the training. The issue occurs across multiple browsers, including Mozilla Firefox, Microsoft Edge, and Google Chrome.
short_description: Unable to complete KnowBe4 Security Training due to error message.
description: User is attempting to finish the KnowBe4 Security Training module. An error message appears stating, "Click on your email platform." This prevents progress in the training. The issue occurs across multiple browsers, including Mozilla Firefox, Microsoft Edge, and Google Chrome.
